name: Sugarless Heart Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the margarine and gelatin.
2. Beat in the egg substitute and vanilla extract.
3. Add the flour and baking powder; mix well.
4. Chill for 1 hour.
5. Roll out on a lightly floured board to 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Cut with a 1-1/4 inch cookie cutter.
7. Place on ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 6-7 minutes, or until bottoms are lightly browned and cookies are set.
9. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: 6 dozen.
